payload.answer: SELECT statements such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10` are allowed in select-only mode; mutation statements such as `DELETE FROM memory_cards` are denied.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL access-control instruction, not a durable user memory.

details: Classified as admin SQL select-only mode.
Allowed SELECT-only operation; denied DELETE mutation.

raw_text: {"intent":"admin_sql","decision":"allow_select_only_deny_mutation","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The input is an administrative SQL access-control instruction, not a durable user memory."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"SELECT statements such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10` are allowed in select-only mode; mutation statements such as `DELETE FROM memory_cards` are denied.","citations":[],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Classified as admin SQL select-only mode.","No memory cards committed.","Allowed SELECT-only operation; denied DELETE mutation."]}}
